concerns.text: FR-002 anchors to 'See US-1', but US-1 (Download GWTC) does not cover downloading IllustrisTNG merger rate data. The data source for FR-002 is missing a corresponding User Story. This is silent scope creep.

FR-009 (Sensitivity analysis on alpha) anchors to 'See US-2'. US-2 covers KS tests and KDEs but does not mention sensitivity analysis or alpha sweeping. This requirement is unanchored to any stated user goal.

FR-010 (Power limitation logging) anchors to 'See US-2'. US-2 focuses on computing distributions and KS tests, not on handling sample size disparities or logging power limitations. This requirement is unanchored.

SC-004 (Runtime measured against 6-hour limit) anchors to 'See US-1'. US-1 is about data download and preprocessing. While related, the 6-hour limit is a system constraint, not a user story goal. It should be anchored to a story covering the full pipeline execution or a non-functional requirement story.
SC-005 (Memory usage) anchors to 'See US-1'. Similar to SC-004, memory constraints are not a goal of the data download story (US-1). This is an unanchored success criterion.
SC-006 (Disk usage) anchors to 'See US-1'. Disk constraints are not a goal of US-1. This is an unanchored success criterion.
